data.title: Nokia Initiates Major Share Buyback Program to Strengthen Market Position
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

An update from Nokia ( (GB:0HAF) ) is now available.

Nokia Corporation has initiated a share buyback program to manage the dilutive effects of new shares issued to Infinera Corporation shareholders and incentives. The program, which complies with EU regulations, aims to repurchase 150 million shares by 2025 with a budget of EUR 900 million. Transactions on 20 December 2024 involved acquiring 872,093 shares at a total cost of EUR 3,657,384, leaving Nokia with 218,626,057 treasury shares. This move is strategic for Nokia’s financial positioning and impacts its market standing by potentially enhancing shareholder value.

More about Nokia

Nokia is a B2B technology innovation leader, specializing in pioneering networks that sense, think, and act by leveraging its expertise across mobile, fixed, and cloud networks. The company is known for creating value through intellectual property and long-term research, led by Nokia Bell Labs. Nokia’s high-performance networks integrate seamlessly into any ecosystem, providing secure, reliable, and sustainable networks that open new opportunities for monetization and scaling digital services and applications worldwide.

YTD Price Performance: 43.82%

Average Trading Volume: 2,578,308

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: €23.18B

Find detailed analytics on 0HAF stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Grupo Supervielle’s Financial Growth in Nine-Month Report
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Grupo Supervielle SA ( (SUPV) ) has shared an announcement.

Grupo Supervielle S.A. released its consolidated condensed interim financial statements for the nine-month period ending September 30, 2024. The report highlights significant growth in several financial positions, such as cash and due from banks, which saw an increase from 461,818,453 to 772,514,009 pesos, and loans and other financing, which rose from 982,244,568 to 1,587,388,791 pesos. This financial performance denotes a positive trajectory for the company within the competitive financial sector, potentially enhancing its market position and shareholder value.

More about Grupo Supervielle SA

Grupo Supervielle S.A., based in Buenos Aires, Argentina, is engaged in financing activities either on its own account or through third parties, both domestically and internationally. The company deals in financial operations such as securities trading and the provision of loans, excluding activities that require public bidding or are covered by the Financial Entities Law.

YTD Price Performance: 265.24%

Average Trading Volume: 1,249,746

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: $1.52B

data.title: BioNxt Solutions Expands Patent Portfolio and Plans Trials

BioNxt Solutions has expanded its patent portfolio by filing new international patents for sublingual drug delivery technologies, targeting autoimmune neurodegenerative diseases like Multiple Sclerosis and Myasthenia Gravis. data.title: G2 Energy Explores Kansas Oil & Gas Acquisition
data.description:
G2 Energy (TSE:GTOO) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

G2 Energy Corp. has signed a Letter of Intent with Global Oil & Gas Recovery Corp. to explore the acquisition of the Shiloh Oil & Gas Leasehold in Southeast Kansas. This potential deal aims to revitalize abandoned wells using Enhanced Oil Recovery techniques, enhancing shareholder value through increased production. The partnership could unlock significant untapped resources in a region with a history of robust oil and gas production.

data.title: Washington Bancorp Repositions Balance Sheet for Growth
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Washington Bancorp ( (WASH) ) has issued an announcement.

Washington Trust Bancorp, Inc. announced a strategic repositioning of its balance sheet to support organic growth and capital generation. This involves selling low-yield assets and reinvesting in higher-yield securities, resulting in a short-term net loss but strengthening the bank’s financial position and improving profitability prospects for 2025.

More about Washington Bancorp

Washington Trust Bancorp, Inc., listed on NASDAQ as WASH, is a publicly-owned holding company for The Washington Trust Company, with assets totaling $7.1 billion as of September 30, 2024. Established in 1800, Washington Trust is the oldest community bank in the U.S., the largest state-chartered bank in Rhode Island, and a leading financial services company in the Northeast. The bank offers commercial banking, mortgage banking, personal banking, and wealth management services across Rhode Island, Connecticut, and Massachusetts, along with digital banking solutions.

data.title: Ferrari Continues Strategic Share Buyback Program
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Ferrari ( (IT:RACE) ) has shared an announcement.

Ferrari N.V. announced the completion of its sixth tranche of a multi-year share buyback program, purchasing additional common shares worth Euro 150 million. This initiative is a part of a larger Euro 2 billion buyback plan expected to conclude by 2026. The ongoing buyback program is aimed at optimizing Ferrari’s capital structure and providing value to its shareholders. To date, the company has invested over Euro 1.2 billion in repurchasing shares on the Euronext Milan and New York Stock Exchange.

More about Ferrari

Ferrari N.V. is a prominent luxury sports car manufacturer based in Maranello, Italy. The company is renowned for producing high-performance vehicles and operates in the luxury automotive industry, focusing on innovation and excellence in design and engineering.

data.title: Prosegur’s Helena Revoredo Retains Control Amid Syndication
data.description:
Prosegur Compania de Seguridad (ES:PSG) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Prosegur Compañía de Seguridad, S.A. has announced that Helena Revoredo Delvecchio will maintain exclusive control over Gubel, S.L., the majority shareholder of Prosegur, despite holding less than 50% of its share capital. Through a syndication agreement, Revoredo will control the majority of the voting rights, ensuring her continued influence over the company and its subsidiary, Prosegur Cash, S.A.
